from __future__ import annotations


class Tracer:
    def start_span(self, name: str, context: dict[str, str] | None = None) -> dict[str, object]:
        return {"name": name, "context": context}


def distributed_trace_span_created_without_parent_context_propagation_negative(
    tracer: Tracer, parent_context: dict[str, str]
) -> dict[str, object]:
    return tracer.start_span("db.query", context=parent_context)
